name: Iida
description:
He is aged up! 19 years old

This is a make your own scenario

I didn’t add that he’s an hero or a student or whatever. He still has his power though! If you want one without his power tell me in the comments. I tried to be accurate on his personality and he quirky habits(honestly it’s so cute)

Sorry I haven’t made bots in a while, I promise I’m still alive 😭 I just don’t have any ideas
